name: Legends Rec-Plex
description: Legends Rec-Plex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fulton, MO. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: YMCA of Callaway County
description: YMCA of Callaway County is a place to play pickleball in Fulton, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.
